home.description: Frontend-focused software developer building fast, intuitive web experiences. Driven by clean code, performance, and the details that make interfaces feel right.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I started in development out of curiosity and found in frontend the balance between logic and user experience. Today, my focus is on understanding and building software beyond the interface.
about.subtitle: What I’ve worked with:
about.ending: Outside of coding, I enjoy video games (especially Minecraft), building hardware like custom keyboards and PCs, and playing chess.

description: Designed and developed multiple React applications used by thousands of collaborators within the corporate ecosystem.
Collaborated with backend, design, and product teams to implement new features and improve user experience.
Elevated the visual quality of products through design systems and optimized application performance.
Developed a full e-commerce application using React, Java, and MySQL as a final project, demonstrating skills in both frontend and backend.
Built RESTful APIs with Java Spring Boot to handle business logic and data persistence.
Implemented agile methodology in group projects, effectively collaborating with peers to deliver high-quality software solutions.
Coordinated a development team as Project Manager, ensuring timely delivery of projects and maintaining effective communication among team members.
Developed multiple video games, from conceptualization to implementation, using Unity and C#.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of frontend-focused builds centered on design systems, performance, and product quality.

1.label: Collaborative home management app
1.title: Domux
1.description: Fullstack PWA to organize tasks, shared expenses, and household routines in one place.

2.label: Link in bio platform
2.title: DevTree
2.description: Fullstack platform where developers can showcase projects, social links, and their online presence through a customizable profile.

3.label: iOS app
3.title: Guess Character
3.description: iOS app that matches the user's personality with a Naruto character based on their answers.

4.label: Movie search web app
4.title: Movie Finder
4.description: Web app for searching movies and displaying detailed information using an external API.

5.label: E-commerce platform
5.title: RaícesMX
5.description: Fullstack online store with a React frontend, Spring Boot backend, MySQL database, and AWS-based infrastructure.

6.label: 3D endless runner video game
6.title: Taxi Runner
6.description: Unity-based endless runner inspired by a taxi driving through Mexico City, created for SODVI with voxel art and an in-game shop system.

7.label: Desktop calculator application
7.title: Java Calculator
7.description: Desktop calculator with a graphical interface fully developed in Java.

8.label: Interactive voting invitation
8.title: Gen Reveal
8.description: Gender reveal invitation with real-time voting and a live results table for guests.

9.label: Event landing page
9.title: Andrew's Shower
9.description: Personal Baby Shower landing page inspired by Hercules.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have an interesting frontend challenge, product idea, or collaboration in mind, let’s talk.
